title: Verify feedback flag injection T11
description: Test that --feedback flag is properly passed through workflow to build stage. Command: @kody --feedback "Use functional style for all utilities". Expected: feedback appears in build stage logs as "feedback: Use functional style..." and FEEDBACK env var set in orchestrate job. This is T11 of the test suite - a verification test for existing feedback injection functionality.
existing_patterns: .github/workflows/kody.yml:207 - FEEDBACK env var passed from workflow inputs/parse outputs to kody-engine
.github/workflows/kody.yml:262 - --feedback flag appended to kody-engine command args when FEEDBACK is set
.kody/runs/567.jsonl - Run history format includes feedback field in JSONL records
